title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: UB V8HeapExplorer::GetSystemEntryName leads to OOB write
description_snippet:
#### VULNERABILITY DETAILS
In [V8HeapExplorer::GetSystemEntryName](https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:v8/src/profiler/heap-snapshot-generator.cc;drc=feaf4438bcf1f96868820e62254495bfa46d3ea0;l=1052), on-heap data is used as input for a switch statement without a default case (se
